prompt_text: a downtempo punk inspired song with 94bpm F, a key changge, some edm house low end, and keep it relaxed but allow the guitar to have some flavour, there should be a blend of organic instruments and synths, and should sound like fidlar meets rufus du sol meets daniel caesar
prompt_zh: 一首受慢节奏朋克 (Downtempo Punk) 启发的歌曲，94bpm F，有调性变化，加入一些EDM House的低频部分，保持放松但允许吉他有一些韵味，应该融合有机乐器和合成器，听起来像是Fidlar遇到Rufus Du Sol遇到Daniel Caesar
title: Until the Sun Rises

translation_meta.title_zh: 慢节奏朋克风格的歌曲

prompt_text: Vocaloid, drum and bass, chaotic, EDM drop, female vocals, electro, techno, synth, bass, song about being a lesbian.
prompt_zh: Vocaloid, drum and bass, 混乱, EDM drop, 女声, electro, techno, synth, bass, 关于同性恋的歌曲。
title: Electric Love
